title: Struthiopteris polypodioides
taxonomy: Struthiopteris polypodioides is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. It is a part of the order Polypodiales and class Polypodiopsida. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other ferns. The genus Struthiopteris is considered to be a synonym of Blechnum, which further adds to the plant's classification complexities. Further research is needed to clarify its exact classification within the plant kingdom.
